name: cosmos-atlas
description: The bold, lively, interactive map of the A Guide to Cloud cosmos. Living solar system at cosmos.aguidetocloud.com.

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/freshness.mjs && node scripts/blog-feed.mjs && node scripts/build-images.mjs
scripts.deploy: node scripts/freshness.mjs && node scripts/blog-feed.mjs && node scripts/build-images.mjs && astro build && node deploy.mjs
